channel.title: Comments on: AtD Bookmarklet – Spell Checking in a Click!

item.title: By: Mike
item.dc:creator: Mike
item.description: Thanks for a wonderful post, l ve been looking for such information, I will join jour rss feed now.
item.content:encoded: Thanks for a wonderful post, l ve been looking for such information, I will join jour rss feed now.

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/atd-bookmarklet-spell-checking-in-a-click/#comment-1181">Ramkumar</a>.
This is a bookmarklet, but there is also a firefox plugin in development which is currently in alpha stage.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Ramkumar.

This is a bookmarklet, but there is also a firefox plugin in development which is currently in alpha stage.

item.title: By: Ramkumar
item.dc:creator: Ramkumar
item.description: Is this a software or an addon for Firefox,. The way it looks like an addon for firefox, correct me if Im wrong :)
item.content:encoded: Is this a software or an addon for Firefox,. The way it looks like an addon for firefox, correct me if Im wrong 🙂

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/atd-bookmarklet-spell-checking-in-a-click/#comment-1060">Raphael Mudge</a>.
That would be great! Looking forward for it! Also for the new version of AtD/jQuery (to be released officially).
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Raphael Mudge.

That would be great! Looking forward for it! Also for the new version of AtD/jQuery (to be released officially).

item.title: By: Raphael Mudge
item.dc:creator: Raphael Mudge
item.description: Thanks for the writeup Gautam. I'm working to improve this feature with contentEditable=true so users can still edit while the highlighted phrases are there. We'll see how it goes :)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the writeup Gautam. I’m working to improve this feature with contentEditable=true so users can still edit while the highlighted phrases are there. We’ll see how it goes 🙂
